attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY     SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 SSO.BK_COMPANY_CODE     BK_COMPANY_CODE,
 SSO.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
 SSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT    BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
 COALESCE(SXOHA.CREATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))  START_TV_DATETIME,
 COALESCE(CAST(SXOHA.CREATION_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD'),CAST('3500-01-01'AS DATE)) START_SSP_DATE,
 CAST ('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)   )       END_TV_DATETIME,
 CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')        END_SSP_DATE,
 'UNKNOWN' SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE, 
 COALESCE(SXOHA.INTENDED_USE,'UNKNOWN')     PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE,                       
 COALESCE(SXOHA.CUST_PO_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN')   PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER,
 COALESCE(CAST(SXOHA.ORDER_SUBMITTED_DATE  AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD'),CAST('3500-01-01'AS DATE)) ORDER_DATETIME,
 COALESCE(SXOHA.BOOKED_DATE ,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME,
 COALESCE(NIC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,'UNK' )TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS INVOICING_DEFERRAL_EXPIR_DTM,
 'N' EARLY_SHIP_ALLOWED_FLAG ,     /* Need Clarity */ 
 '=' PARTIAL_SHIPMENT_ALLOWED_FLAG,
 '=' SALES_ORDER_OPEN_FLAG,
 'UNKNOWN' AS CUSTOMER_SERVICE_REP_NAME ,  /*derived based on CSRM tables*/
 NULL AS PURCHASE_ORDER_DATE,  /*loaded frm header_ext*/
 NULL AS FAX_RECEIVED_DATETIME,  /*loaded frm header_ext*/
 CASE WHEN SXOHA.FLOW_STATUS_CODE  IN ('CLOSED','CANCELED' ) THEN  SXOHA.FLOW_STATUS_CODE
 ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END    COMPLETE_ORDER_RESULT_CODE,
 NULL AS SALES_ORDER_EXPIRATION_DTM,  /*loaded frm header_ext*/
 NULL AS CUST_SVC_REP_TEAM_NAME, /*derived based on CSRM tables*/
 NULL CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE,                                                                                      
 COALESCE(SXOHA.ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF,'UNKNOWN')  ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_REFERENCE_CODE,
 NULL AS SUBMITTED_ON_WEB_BY_NAME, /*loaded frm header_ext*/
COALESCE(SXOHA.BOOKED_DATE,CAST('3500/01/01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) ) AS RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME, /*loaded frm header_ext*/
 NULL AS  BK_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE , 
  COALESCE(SXOHA.DEAL_ID ,'UNKNOWN') BK_DEAL_ID,
 COALESCE(NPL.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME,'UNKNOWN')  BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME,                                   
 COALESCE(  ESOS.NAME,'UNKNOWN')  BK_SO_SOURCE_NAME,                                                                            
 'UNKNOWN' BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
  NULL BK_FOB_POINT_CODE,
  NULL BK_FREIGHT_TERMS_CODE,
 COALESCE(SXOHA.CREATION_DATE,CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))    BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,
 COALESCE(SXOHA.LAST_UPDATED_DATE,CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))  BK_SO_SRC_UPD_DATETIME,
 COALESCE(NSCT.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,'UNKNOWN')   BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
 'ERP'  BK_SALES_CHANNEL_SOURCE_TYPE,       
 '='  CISCO_BOOKED_STATUS_ROLE   ,                                                                       
 'ORDER' SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,                                                                                      
 -6666 SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,
 'OPL' SS_CODE,                                                                               
 '='  CANCELLED_FLAG,                                                                                      
 NULL PRICING_DATETIME,                                                                                             
 -999 SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 COALESCE(NECALU_BILL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY,-999)   BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 -999 SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 -6666 RU_BK_ORIG_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
 USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
 COALESCE(SXOHA.FLOW_STATUS_CODE,'=')           ORDER_CYCLE_STATUS_CD,
 'UNKNOWN'                                      SO_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
 'UNKNOWN'                                      SO_MODIFIED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
 'N' CUSTOMER_ACCEPTANCE_FLG,
   COALESCE(SXOHA.PROGRAM_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS PROGRAM_TYPE, /* Q4FY19  JUNE Try and Buy Annuity Release */
 'N' ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG,
 'N' XCAT_FLG ,
 'OPL' MIGRATION_TRX_SRC_CD,	 		
 SXOHA.HEADER_ID SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT,	  		
 SXOHA.HEADER_ID SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT,	     		
 COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') BK_WEB_ORDER_ID	,	       		
 --CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EP_REPLICATION_REFRESH_DTM   ,	
 COALESCE(CAST (CAST(CAST(SXOHA.ORDER_SOURCE_ID AS DECIMAL(18,0)) AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR(50)),'UNKNOWN')ORDER_SRC_APPLICATION_NAME	,	
 --COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_TYPE_ID,'UNKNOWN') ORDER_TYPE_CD					,
 COALESCE(SXOHA.ACCOUNT_TYPE_CODE,'UNKNOWN') ACCOUNT_TYPE_CD			,		
 COALESCE(NCPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999) BILL_TO_PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY , 
-- COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_ORIGIN,'UNKNOWN') ORDER_ORIGIN_CD	,	
COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_ORIGIN,'UNKNOWN') ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
CASE WHEN (coalesce(SXOHA.ORDER_ORIGIN,'UNKNOWN')= COALESCE(EL_CNTL.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,'UNKNOWN')  AND EL_CNTL.NAME='Acquisitions') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS ACQUISITION_ROLE ,	
COALESCE(SXOHA.MIGRATION_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS MIGRATED_ORDER_OFFER_TYPE_CD,/*ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY19 EA MIGRATION - SIGORANT*/
COALESCE(SXOHA.SK_ACQ_OPTY_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS ACQUISTION_OPPORTUNITY_ID,
COALESCE(SXOHA.SK_ACQ_CAPTURED_ORDER_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS ACQUISITION_CAPTURE_ID,
 /* Added as part of SFP June 28th Rel */
 CAST (COALESCE(SXOHA.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID,-999) AS INTEGER) AS BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
 SXOHA.DISTI_SO_NUMBER AS DISTRI_EXTERNAL_SO_NUM,
 COALESCE(SXOHA.SOLD_FOR_PRICE_FLAG, '=') AS SOLD_FOR_NET_PRICE_FLG,
 COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_ORIGIN,'UNKNOWN') ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
COALESCE(SXOHA.MASTER_AGENT_ID,RANDOM(-1001800,-1000000)) AS MASTER_AGENT_BE_GEO_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN COALESCE(SXOHA.SUB_AGENT_ID,'-999') ='-999' AND MASTER_AGENT_BE_GEO_ID_INT < 0 THEN MASTER_AGENT_BE_GEO_ID_INT ELSE SXOHA.SUB_AGENT_ID END AS EXTERNAL_SUB_AGENT_ID,
COALESCE(SXOHA.TRANSACTION_FLOW,'UNKNOWN') FLEX_UP_AUTO_TRANS_FLOW_CD, /* Q1FY22 SEP ATHENA REL*/
CASE WHEN (SXOHA.DEAL_TYPE = 1 or SXOHA.DEAL_TYPE = 3) THEN 'STANDARD'
WHEN (SXOHA.DEAL_TYPE = 2 or SXOHA.DEAL_TYPE = 5) THEN 'NON-STANDARD' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS DV_CONFIGURATION_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(SXOHA.AUTO_RENEWAL_FLAG,'N') AS AUTO_RENEWAL_ELIGIBLE_FLG, /*Added for Auto Renewal Flag - Aug22*/
 'I' ACTION_CODE,
 CASE WHEN NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END AS DML_TYPE

 FROM
 (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_HDRS_ALL
WHERE ERP_ORDER_NUMBER IS NULL
AND ORDER_ORIGIN<>'CLOUD-CBM') SXOHA  
 INNER JOIN 
(SELECT SSO.*, COALESCE(SSO.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT , SSO.SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT) SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW FROM 
$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO WHERE SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW<>-999) SSO
 ON SXOHA.HEADER_ID=SSO.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW
 AND SSO.SS_CODE='OPL'
 LEFT JOIN  
  $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_SOURCES ESOS
  ON  (SXOHA.ORDER_SOURCE_ID=ESOS.SK_ORDER_SOURCE_ID and ESOS.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
LEFT JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_CHANNEL NSCT
 ON NSCT.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE=SXOHA.BILLTO_CHANNELID
 AND TRIM(NSCT.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_SOURCE_TYPE)='ERP'
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_BILL
 ON (NECALU_BILL.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = SXOHA.INVOICE_TO_ORG_ID)
 LEFT JOIN    $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY  NIC
 ON  NIC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE =SXOHA.CURRENCY_CODE      
 LEFT JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRICE_LIST  NPL  
 ON NPL.SK_PRICE_LIST_ID_INT=SXOHA.PRICE_LIST_ID
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE NCPS
 ON NCPS.BK_PARTY_ID_INT=NECALU_BILL.EP_CR_PARTY_ID_INT
 LEFT JOIN 
 (SELECT NSO.*,COALESCE(SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT,SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT) SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW FROM 
 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO WHERE SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW<>-999) NSO
 ON NSO.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW=SXOHA.HEADER_ID  
 AND NSO.SS_CODE='OPL'
/* ADDED AS A PART OF Q4FY19 POST CUT OVER ACQ */
 LEFT JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_OE_ORDER_SOURCES  EL  
 ON COALESCE(EL.ORDER_SOURCE_ID,-999) = COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_SOURCE_ID,-999)
 LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_ACQ_FLOW_CNTRL EL_CNTL
 ON COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_ORIGIN,'UNKNOWN')= COALESCE(EL_CNTL.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,'UNKNOWN')
 AND COALESCE(EL.ORDER_SOURCE_ID,-999)=COALESCE(EL_CNTL.ORDER_SOURCE_ID,-999)
 WHERE 
 ((COALESCE(EL_CNTL.NAME,'UNKNOWN') <> 'Acquisitions')
 OR
 (COALESCE(EL_CNTL.NAME,'UNKNOWN') = 'Acquisitions'
 AND EL_CNTL.ACQ_CNTRL_FLG = 'Y')
 )

SELECT
 SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY     SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 SSO.BK_COMPANY_CODE     BK_COMPANY_CODE,
 SSO.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
 SSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT    BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
 COALESCE(SXOHA.CREATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))  START_TV_DATETIME,
 COALESCE(CAST(SXOHA.CREATION_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD'),CAST('3500-01-01'AS DATE)) START_SSP_DATE,
 CAST ('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)   )       END_TV_DATETIME,
 CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')        END_SSP_DATE,
 'UNKNOWN' SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE, 
 COALESCE(SXOHA.INTENDED_USE,'UNKNOWN')     PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE,                       
 COALESCE(SXOHA.CUST_PO_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN')   PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER,
 COALESCE(CAST(SXOHA.ORDER_SUBMITTED_DATE  AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD'),CAST('3500-01-01'AS DATE)) ORDER_DATETIME,
 COALESCE(SXOHA.BOOKED_DATE ,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME,
 COALESCE(NIC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,'UNK' )TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS INVOICING_DEFERRAL_EXPIR_DTM,
 'N' EARLY_SHIP_ALLOWED_FLAG ,     /* Need Clarity */ 
 '=' PARTIAL_SHIPMENT_ALLOWED_FLAG,
 '=' SALES_ORDER_OPEN_FLAG,
 'UNKNOWN' AS CUSTOMER_SERVICE_REP_NAME ,  /*derived based on CSRM tables*/
 NULL AS PURCHASE_ORDER_DATE,  /*loaded frm header_ext*/
 NULL AS FAX_RECEIVED_DATETIME,  /*loaded frm header_ext*/
 CASE WHEN SXOHA.FLOW_STATUS_CODE  IN ('CLOSED','CANCELED' ) THEN  SXOHA.FLOW_STATUS_CODE
 ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END    COMPLETE_ORDER_RESULT_CODE,
 NULL AS SALES_ORDER_EXPIRATION_DTM,  /*loaded frm header_ext*/
 NULL AS CUST_SVC_REP_TEAM_NAME, /*derived based on CSRM tables*/
 NULL CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE,                                                                                      
 COALESCE(SXOHA.ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF,'UNKNOWN')  ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_REFERENCE_CODE,
 NULL AS SUBMITTED_ON_WEB_BY_NAME, /*loaded frm header_ext*/
 COALESCE(SXOHA.BOOKED_DATE,CAST('3500/01/01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) ) AS RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME, /*loaded frm header_ext*/
 NULL AS  BK_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE , 
 COALESCE(SXOHA.DEAL_ID ,'UNKNOWN') BK_DEAL_ID,
 COALESCE(NPL.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME,'UNKNOWN')  BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME,                                   
 COALESCE(  ESOS.NAME,'UNKNOWN')  BK_SO_SOURCE_NAME,                                                                                                                       
 'UNKNOWN' BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
  NULL BK_FOB_POINT_CODE,
  NULL BK_FREIGHT_TERMS_CODE,
 COALESCE(SXOHA.CREATION_DATE,CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))    BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,
 COALESCE(SXOHA.LAST_UPDATED_DATE,CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))  BK_SO_SRC_UPD_DATETIME,
 COALESCE(NSCT.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,'UNKNOWN')   BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
 'ERP'  BK_SALES_CHANNEL_SOURCE_TYPE,       
 '='  CISCO_BOOKED_STATUS_ROLE   ,                                                                       
 'ORDER' SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,                                                                                      
 -6666 SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,
 'OPL' SS_CODE,                                                                               
 '='  CANCELLED_FLAG,                                                                                      
 NULL PRICING_DATETIME,                                                                                             
 -999 SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 COALESCE(NECALU_BILL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY,-999)   BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 -999 SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 -6666 RU_BK_ORIG_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
 USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
 COALESCE(SXOHA.FLOW_STATUS_CODE,'=')           ORDER_CYCLE_STATUS_CD,
 'UNKNOWN'                                      SO_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
 'UNKNOWN'                                      SO_MODIFIED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
 'N' CUSTOMER_ACCEPTANCE_FLG,
  COALESCE(SXOHA.PROGRAM_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS  PROGRAM_TYPE, /* Q4FY19  JUNE Try and Buy Annuity Release */
 'N' ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG,
 'N' XCAT_FLG ,
 'OPL' MIGRATION_TRX_SRC_CD,	 		
 SXOHA.HEADER_ID SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT,	  		
 SXOHA.HEADER_ID SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT,	     		
 COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') BK_WEB_ORDER_ID	,	       		
 --CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EP_REPLICATION_REFRESH_DTM   ,	
 COALESCE(CAST (CAST(CAST(SXOHA.ORDER_SOURCE_ID AS DECIMAL(18,0)) AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR(50)),'UNKNOWN')ORDER_SRC_APPLICATION_NAME	,	
 --COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_TYPE_ID,'UNKNOWN') ORDER_TYPE_CD					,
 COALESCE(SXOHA.ACCOUNT_TYPE_CODE,'UNKNOWN') ACCOUNT_TYPE_CD			,		
 COALESCE(NCPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999) BILL_TO_PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY , 
-- COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_ORIGIN,'UNKNOWN') ORDER_ORIGIN_CD	,		
COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_ORIGIN,'UNKNOWN') ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
CASE WHEN (coalesce(SXOHA.ORDER_ORIGIN,'UNKNOWN')= COALESCE(EL_CNTL.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,'UNKNOWN')  AND EL_CNTL.NAME='Acquisitions') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS ACQUISITION_ROLE ,
COALESCE(SXOHA.MIGRATION_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS MIGRATED_ORDER_OFFER_TYPE_CD,/*ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY19 EA MIGRATION - SIGORANT*/
COALESCE(SXOHA.SK_ACQ_OPTY_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS ACQUISTION_OPPORTUNITY_ID,
COALESCE(SXOHA.SK_ACQ_CAPTURED_ORDER_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS ACQUISITION_CAPTURE_ID,
 /* Added as part of SFP June 28th Rel */
  CAST (COALESCE(SXOHA.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID,-999) AS INTEGER) AS BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
 SXOHA.DISTI_SO_NUMBER AS DISTRI_EXTERNAL_SO_NUM,
 COALESCE(SXOHA.SOLD_FOR_PRICE_FLAG, '=') AS SOLD_FOR_NET_PRICE_FLG,	
COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_ORIGIN,'UNKNOWN') ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
COALESCE(SXOHA.MASTER_AGENT_ID,RANDOM(-1001800,-1000000)) AS DV_MASTER_AGENT_BE_GEO_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN COALESCE(SXOHA.SUB_AGENT_ID,'-999') ='-999' AND DV_MASTER_AGENT_BE_GEO_ID_INT < 0 THEN DV_MASTER_AGENT_BE_GEO_ID_INT ELSE SXOHA.SUB_AGENT_ID END AS EXTERNAL_SUB_AGENT_ID,
COALESCE(SXOHA.TRANSACTION_FLOW,'UNKNOWN') FLEX_UP_AUTO_TRANS_FLOW_CD, /* ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY22 SEP ATHENA REL*/
CASE WHEN (SXOHA.DEAL_TYPE = 1 or SXOHA.DEAL_TYPE = 3) THEN 'STANDARD'
WHEN (SXOHA.DEAL_TYPE = 2 or SXOHA.DEAL_TYPE = 5) THEN 'NON-STANDARD' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS DV_CONFIGURATION_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(SXOHA.AUTO_RENEWAL_FLAG,'N') AS AUTO_RENEWAL_ELIGIBLE_FLG, /*Added for Auto Renewal Flag - Aug22*/
 'I' ACTION_CODE,
 'C'  AS DML_TYPE

 FROM
 (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_HDRS_ALL
WHERE ERP_ORDER_NUMBER IS NOT NULL
AND ORDER_ORIGIN <> 'CLOUD-CBM' ) SXOHA  
 INNER JOIN  
 (SELECT SSO.*,COALESCE(SSO.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT , SSO.SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT) SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW 
 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO)SSO
 ON SXOHA.HEADER_ID=SSO.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW  
 LEFT JOIN  
  $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_SOURCES ESOS
  ON (SXOHA.ORDER_SOURCE_ID=ESOS.SK_ORDER_SOURCE_ID and  ESOS.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
LEFT JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_CHANNEL NSCT
 ON NSCT.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE=SXOHA.BILLTO_CHANNELID
 AND TRIM(NSCT.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_SOURCE_TYPE)='ERP'
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_BILL
 ON (NECALU_BILL.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = SXOHA.INVOICE_TO_ORG_ID)
 LEFT JOIN    $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY  NIC
 ON  NIC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE =SXOHA.CURRENCY_CODE      
 LEFT JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRICE_LIST  NPL  
 ON NPL.SK_PRICE_LIST_ID_INT=SXOHA.PRICE_LIST_ID
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE NCPS
 ON NCPS.BK_PARTY_ID_INT=NECALU_BILL.EP_CR_PARTY_ID_INT
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
 ON (NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT=SXOHA.ERP_ORDER_NUMBER)
/* ADDED AS A PART OF Q4FY19 POST CUT OVER ACQ */
 LEFT JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_OE_ORDER_SOURCES  EL  
 ON COALESCE(EL.ORDER_SOURCE_ID,-999) = COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_SOURCE_ID,-999)
 LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_ACQ_FLOW_CNTRL EL_CNTL
 ON COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_ORIGIN,'UNKNOWN')= COALESCE(EL_CNTL.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,'UNKNOWN')
 AND COALESCE(EL.ORDER_SOURCE_ID,-999)=COALESCE(EL_CNTL.ORDER_SOURCE_ID,-999)
 WHERE 
 ((COALESCE(EL_CNTL.NAME,'UNKNOWN') <> 'Acquisitions')
 OR
 (COALESCE(EL_CNTL.NAME,'UNKNOWN') = 'Acquisitions'
 AND EL_CNTL.ACQ_CNTRL_FLG = 'Y')
 )

SELECT
 SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY     SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 SSO.BK_COMPANY_CODE     BK_COMPANY_CODE,
 SSO.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_NUMBER,-6666) AS   BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
 COALESCE(SXOHA.CREATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))  START_TV_DATETIME,
 COALESCE(CAST(SXOHA.CREATION_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD'),CAST('3500-01-01'AS DATE)) START_SSP_DATE,
 CAST ('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)   )       END_TV_DATETIME,
 CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')        END_SSP_DATE,
  SXOHA.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE AS SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE, 
 COALESCE(SXOHA.INTENDED_USE,'UNKNOWN')     PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE,                       
 COALESCE(SXOHA.CUST_PO_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN')   PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER,
 COALESCE(CAST(SXOHA.ORDER_SUBMITTED_DATE  AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD'),CAST('3500-01-01'AS DATE)) ORDER_DATETIME,
 COALESCE(SXOHA.BOOKED_DATE ,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME,
 COALESCE(NIC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,'UNK' )TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS INVOICING_DEFERRAL_EXPIR_DTM,
 'N' EARLY_SHIP_ALLOWED_FLAG ,     /* Need Clarity */ 
 '=' PARTIAL_SHIPMENT_ALLOWED_FLAG,
 '=' SALES_ORDER_OPEN_FLAG,
 'UNKNOWN' AS CUSTOMER_SERVICE_REP_NAME ,  /*derived based on CSRM tables*/
  SXOHA.CUSTOMER_PO_DATE AS PURCHASE_ORDER_DATE,  /*loaded frm header_ext*/
 NULL AS FAX_RECEIVED_DATETIME,  /*loaded frm header_ext*/
 CASE WHEN SXOHA.FLOW_STATUS_CODE  IN ('CLOSED','CANCELED' ) THEN  SXOHA.FLOW_STATUS_CODE
 ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END    COMPLETE_ORDER_RESULT_CODE,
 NULL AS SALES_ORDER_EXPIRATION_DTM,  /*loaded frm header_ext*/
 NULL AS CUST_SVC_REP_TEAM_NAME, /*derived based on CSRM tables*/
 NULL CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE,                                                                                      
 COALESCE(SXOHA.ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF,'UNKNOWN')  ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_REFERENCE_CODE,
 NULL AS SUBMITTED_ON_WEB_BY_NAME, /*loaded frm header_ext*/
COALESCE(SXOHA.BOOKED_DATE,CAST('3500/01/01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) ) AS RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME, /*loaded frm header_ext*/
 NULL AS  BK_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE , 
 COALESCE(SXOHA.DEAL_ID ,'UNKNOWN') BK_DEAL_ID,
 COALESCE(NPL.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME,'UNKNOWN')  BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME,                                   
   COALESCE( ESOS.NAME,'UNKNOWN')  BK_SO_SOURCE_NAME,                                                                         
  COALESCE(ESOT.NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
  NULL BK_FOB_POINT_CODE,
  NULL BK_FREIGHT_TERMS_CODE,
 COALESCE(SXOHA.CREATION_DATE,CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))    BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,
 COALESCE(SXOHA.LAST_UPDATED_DATE,CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))  BK_SO_SRC_UPD_DATETIME,
 COALESCE(NSCT.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,'UNKNOWN')   BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
 'ERP'  BK_SALES_CHANNEL_SOURCE_TYPE,       
 '='  CISCO_BOOKED_STATUS_ROLE   ,                                                                       
 COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_CATEGORY,'UNKNOWN') SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,                                                                                      
  COALESCE(SXOHA.HEADER_ID,-6666) AS SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,
 'OPL' SS_CODE,                                                                               
  COALESCE(SXOHA.CANCELLED_FLAG,'N') AS  CANCELLED_FLAG,                                                                                       
 NULL PRICING_DATETIME,                                                                                             
 -999 SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 COALESCE(NECALU_BILL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY,-999)   BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 /*-999 SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,*/
 COALESCE(NCAT_SOLD.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY ,-999) AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 -6666 RU_BK_ORIG_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
 USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
 COALESCE(SXOHA.FLOW_STATUS_CODE,'=')           ORDER_CYCLE_STATUS_CD,
 'UNKNOWN'                                      SO_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
 'UNKNOWN'                                      SO_MODIFIED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
  COALESCE(SXOHA.CUSTOMER_ACCEPTANCE_FLAG,'N') AS CUSTOMER_ACCEPTANCE_FLAG,
   COALESCE(SXOHA.PROGRAM_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS PROGRAM_TYPE, /* Q4FY19  JUNE Try and Buy Annuity Release */
 'N' ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG,
 'N' XCAT_FLG ,
 'OPL' MIGRATION_TRX_SRC_CD,	 		
 SXOHA.HEADER_ID SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT,	  		
 SXOHA.HEADER_ID SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT,	     		
 COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') BK_WEB_ORDER_ID	,	       		
 --CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EP_REPLICATION_REFRESH_DTM   ,	
 COALESCE(CAST (CAST(CAST(SXOHA.ORDER_SOURCE_ID AS DECIMAL(18,0)) AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR(50)),'UNKNOWN')ORDER_SRC_APPLICATION_NAME	,	
 --COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_TYPE_ID,'UNKNOWN') ORDER_TYPE_CD					,
 COALESCE(SXOHA.ACCOUNT_TYPE_CODE,'UNKNOWN') ACCOUNT_TYPE_CD			,		
 COALESCE(NCPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999) BILL_TO_PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY , 
-- COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_ORIGIN,'UNKNOWN') ORDER_ORIGIN_CD	,	
COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_ORIGIN,'UNKNOWN') ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
CASE WHEN (coalesce(SXOHA.ORDER_ORIGIN,'UNKNOWN')= COALESCE(EL_CNTL.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,'UNKNOWN')  AND EL_CNTL.NAME='Acquisitions') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS ACQUISITION_ROLE ,	
COALESCE(SXOHA.MIGRATION_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS MIGRATED_ORDER_OFFER_TYPE_CD,/*ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY19 EA MIGRATION - SIGORANT*/
COALESCE(SXOHA.SK_ACQ_OPTY_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS ACQUISTION_OPPORTUNITY_ID,
COALESCE(SXOHA.SK_ACQ_CAPTURED_ORDER_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS ACQUISITION_CAPTURE_ID,
 /* Added as part of SFP June 28th Rel */
 CAST (COALESCE(SXOHA.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID,-999) AS INTEGER) AS BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
 SXOHA.DISTI_SO_NUMBER AS DISTRI_EXTERNAL_SO_NUM,
 COALESCE(SXOHA.SOLD_FOR_PRICE_FLAG, '=') AS SOLD_FOR_NET_PRICE_FLG,
 COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_ORIGIN,'UNKNOWN') ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
 COALESCE(SXOHA.MASTER_AGENT_ID,RANDOM(-1001800,-1000000)) AS DV_MASTER_AGENT_BE_GEO_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN COALESCE(SXOHA.SUB_AGENT_ID,'-999') = '-999' AND DV_MASTER_AGENT_BE_GEO_ID_INT < 0 THEN DV_MASTER_AGENT_BE_GEO_ID_INT ELSE SXOHA.SUB_AGENT_ID END AS EXTERNAL_SUB_AGENT_ID,
 COALESCE(SXOHA.TRANSACTION_FLOW,'UNKNOWN') FLEX_UP_AUTO_TRANS_FLOW_CD, /* ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY22 SEP ATHENA REL*/
 CASE WHEN (SXOHA.DEAL_TYPE = 1 or SXOHA.DEAL_TYPE = 3) THEN 'STANDARD'
WHEN (SXOHA.DEAL_TYPE = 2 or SXOHA.DEAL_TYPE = 5) THEN 'NON-STANDARD' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS DV_CONFIGURATION_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(SXOHA.AUTO_RENEWAL_FLAG,'N') AS AUTO_RENEWAL_ELIGIBLE_FLG, /*Added for Auto Renewal Flag - Aug22*/
 'I' ACTION_CODE,
 CASE WHEN NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END AS DML_TYPE

 FROM
 (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_HDRS_ALL
WHERE ERP_ORDER_NUMBER IS NULL
AND ORDER_ORIGIN='CLOUD-CBM') SXOHA  
 INNER JOIN 
(SELECT SSO.*, COALESCE(SSO.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT , SSO.SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT) SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW FROM 
$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO WHERE SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW<>-999) SSO
 ON SXOHA.HEADER_ID=SSO.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW
 AND SSO.SS_CODE='OPL'
 LEFT JOIN  
  $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_SOURCES ESOS
  ON  (SXOHA.ORDER_SOURCE_ID=ESOS.SK_ORDER_SOURCE_ID and ESOS.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
 /* Added below join to derive SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY */
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCAT_SOLD
  ON (SXOHA.SOLD_TO_ORG_ID=NCAT_SOLD.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT )
/* Added below join as part of CBM Scope for deriving BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME*/
 LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_TYPES ESOT
 ON ESOT.SK_ORDER_TYPE_ID = SXOHA.ORDER_TYPE_ID
 LEFT JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_CHANNEL NSCT
 ON NSCT.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE=SXOHA.BILLTO_CHANNELID
 AND TRIM(NSCT.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_SOURCE_TYPE)='ERP'
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_BILL
 ON (NECALU_BILL.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = SXOHA.INVOICE_TO_ORG_ID)
 LEFT JOIN    $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY  NIC
 ON  NIC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE =SXOHA.CURRENCY_CODE      
 LEFT JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRICE_LIST  NPL  
 ON NPL.SK_PRICE_LIST_ID_INT=SXOHA.PRICE_LIST_ID
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE NCPS
 ON NCPS.BK_PARTY_ID_INT=NECALU_BILL.EP_CR_PARTY_ID_INT
 LEFT JOIN 
 (SELECT NSO.*,COALESCE(SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT,SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT) SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW FROM 
 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO WHERE SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW<>-999) NSO
 ON NSO.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW=SXOHA.HEADER_ID  
 AND NSO.SS_CODE='OPL'
/* ADDED AS A PART OF Q4FY19 POST CUT OVER ACQ */
 LEFT JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_OE_ORDER_SOURCES  EL  
 ON COALESCE(EL.ORDER_SOURCE_ID,-999) = COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_SOURCE_ID,-999)
 LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_ACQ_FLOW_CNTRL EL_CNTL
 ON COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_ORIGIN,'UNKNOWN')= COALESCE(EL_CNTL.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,'UNKNOWN')
 AND COALESCE(EL.ORDER_SOURCE_ID,-999)=COALESCE(EL_CNTL.ORDER_SOURCE_ID,-999)
 WHERE 
 ((COALESCE(EL_CNTL.NAME,'UNKNOWN') <> 'Acquisitions')
 OR
 (COALESCE(EL_CNTL.NAME,'UNKNOWN') = 'Acquisitions'
 AND EL_CNTL.ACQ_CNTRL_FLG = 'Y')
 )

SELECT
  SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY     SALES_ORDER_KEY,
  SSO.BK_COMPANY_CODE     BK_COMPANY_CODE,
  SSO.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
  COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_NUMBER,-6666) AS   BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
  COALESCE(SXOHA.CREATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))  START_TV_DATETIME,
  COALESCE(CAST(SXOHA.CREATION_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD'),CAST('3500-01-01'AS DATE)) START_SSP_DATE,
  CAST ('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)   )       END_TV_DATETIME,
  CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')        END_SSP_DATE,
  SXOHA.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE AS SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE, 
  COALESCE(SXOHA.INTENDED_USE,'UNKNOWN')     PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE,                       
  COALESCE(SXOHA.CUST_PO_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN')   PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER,
  COALESCE(CAST(SXOHA.ORDER_SUBMITTED_DATE  AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD'),CAST('3500-01-01'AS DATE)) ORDER_DATETIME,
  COALESCE(SXOHA.BOOKED_DATE ,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME,
  COALESCE(NIC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,'UNK' )TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS INVOICING_DEFERRAL_EXPIR_DTM,
  'N' EARLY_SHIP_ALLOWED_FLAG ,     /* Need Clarity */ 
  '=' PARTIAL_SHIPMENT_ALLOWED_FLAG,
  '=' SALES_ORDER_OPEN_FLAG,
  'UNKNOWN' AS CUSTOMER_SERVICE_REP_NAME ,  /*derived based on CSRM tables*/
  SXOHA.CUSTOMER_PO_DATE AS PURCHASE_ORDER_DATE,  /*loaded frm header_ext*/
  NULL AS FAX_RECEIVED_DATETIME,  /*loaded frm header_ext*/
  CASE WHEN SXOHA.FLOW_STATUS_CODE  IN ('CLOSED','CANCELED' ) THEN  SXOHA.FLOW_STATUS_CODE
  ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END    COMPLETE_ORDER_RESULT_CODE,
  NULL AS SALES_ORDER_EXPIRATION_DTM,  /*loaded frm header_ext*/
  NULL AS CUST_SVC_REP_TEAM_NAME, /*derived based on CSRM tables*/
  NULL CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE,                                                                                      
  COALESCE(SXOHA.ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF,'UNKNOWN')  ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_REFERENCE_CODE,
  NULL AS SUBMITTED_ON_WEB_BY_NAME, /*loaded frm header_ext*/
  COALESCE(SXOHA.BOOKED_DATE,CAST('3500/01/01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) ) AS RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME, /*loaded frm header_ext*/
  NULL AS  BK_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE , 
  COALESCE(SXOHA.DEAL_ID ,'UNKNOWN') BK_DEAL_ID,
  COALESCE(NPL.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME,'UNKNOWN')  BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME,                                   
  COALESCE(ESOS.NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_SO_SOURCE_NAME,                                                                                                                     
  COALESCE(ESOT.NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
   NULL BK_FOB_POINT_CODE,
   NULL BK_FREIGHT_TERMS_CODE,
  COALESCE(SXOHA.CREATION_DATE,CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))    BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,
  COALESCE(SXOHA.LAST_UPDATED_DATE,CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))  BK_SO_SRC_UPD_DATETIME,
  COALESCE(NSCT.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,'UNKNOWN')   BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
  'ERP'  BK_SALES_CHANNEL_SOURCE_TYPE,       
  '='  CISCO_BOOKED_STATUS_ROLE   ,                                                                       
  COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_CATEGORY,'UNKNOWN') SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,                                                                                      
  COALESCE(SXOHA.HEADER_ID,-6666) AS SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,
 'OPL' SS_CODE,                                                                              
  COALESCE(SXOHA.CANCELLED_FLAG,'N') AS  CANCELLED_FLAG,                                                                                      
  NULL PRICING_DATETIME,                                                                                             
  -999 SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  COALESCE(NECALU_BILL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY,-999)   BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 /*-999 SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,*/
 COALESCE(NCAT_SOLD.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY ,-999) AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  -6666 RU_BK_ORIG_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
  USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
  USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
  COALESCE(SXOHA.FLOW_STATUS_CODE,'=')           ORDER_CYCLE_STATUS_CD,
  'UNKNOWN'                                      SO_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
  'UNKNOWN'                                      SO_MODIFIED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
  COALESCE(SXOHA.CUSTOMER_ACCEPTANCE_FLAG,'N') AS CUSTOMER_ACCEPTANCE_FLAG,
   COALESCE(SXOHA.PROGRAM_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS  PROGRAM_TYPE, /* Q4FY19  JUNE Try and Buy Annuity Release */
  'N' ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG,
  'N' XCAT_FLG ,
  'OPL' MIGRATION_TRX_SRC_CD,    
  SXOHA.HEADER_ID SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT,     
  SXOHA.HEADER_ID SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT,        
  COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') BK_WEB_ORDER_ID ,          
  --CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EP_REPLICATION_REFRESH_DTM   , 
  COALESCE(CAST (CAST(CAST(SXOHA.ORDER_SOURCE_ID AS DECIMAL(18,0)) AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR(50)),'UNKNOWN')ORDER_SRC_APPLICATION_NAME , 
  --COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_TYPE_ID,'UNKNOWN') ORDER_TYPE_CD     ,
  COALESCE(SXOHA.ACCOUNT_TYPE_CODE,'UNKNOWN') ACCOUNT_TYPE_CD   ,  
  COALESCE(NCPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999) BILL_TO_PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY , 
 -- COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_ORIGIN,'UNKNOWN') ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ,  
 COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_ORIGIN,'UNKNOWN') ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
 CASE WHEN (coalesce(SXOHA.ORDER_ORIGIN,'UNKNOWN')= COALESCE(EL_CNTL.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,'UNKNOWN')  AND EL_CNTL.NAME='Acquisitions') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS ACQUISITION_ROLE ,
 COALESCE(SXOHA.MIGRATION_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS MIGRATED_ORDER_OFFER_TYPE_CD,/*ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY19 EA MIGRATION - SIGORANT*/  
COALESCE(SXOHA.SK_ACQ_OPTY_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS ACQUISTION_OPPORTUNITY_ID,
COALESCE(SXOHA.SK_ACQ_CAPTURED_ORDER_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS ACQUISITION_CAPTURE_ID,
 /* Added as part of SFP June 28th Rel */
  CAST (COALESCE(SXOHA.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID,-999) AS INTEGER) AS BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
 SXOHA.DISTI_SO_NUMBER AS DISTRI_EXTERNAL_SO_NUM,
 COALESCE(SXOHA.SOLD_FOR_PRICE_FLAG, '=') AS SOLD_FOR_NET_PRICE_FLG,	
COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_ORIGIN,'UNKNOWN') ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
COALESCE(SXOHA.MASTER_AGENT_ID,RANDOM(-1001800,-1000000)) AS DV_MASTER_AGENT_BE_GEO_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN COALESCE(SXOHA.SUB_AGENT_ID,'-999') = '-999' AND DV_MASTER_AGENT_BE_GEO_ID_INT < 0 THEN DV_MASTER_AGENT_BE_GEO_ID_INT ELSE SXOHA.SUB_AGENT_ID END AS EXTERNAL_SUB_AGENT_ID,
COALESCE(SXOHA.TRANSACTION_FLOW,'UNKNOWN') FLEX_UP_AUTO_TRANS_FLOW_CD, /* ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY22 SEP ATHENA REL*/
CASE WHEN (SXOHA.DEAL_TYPE = 1 or SXOHA.DEAL_TYPE = 3) THEN 'STANDARD'
WHEN (SXOHA.DEAL_TYPE = 2 or SXOHA.DEAL_TYPE = 5) THEN 'NON-STANDARD' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS DV_CONFIGURATION_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(SXOHA.AUTO_RENEWAL_FLAG,'N') AS AUTO_RENEWAL_ELIGIBLE_FLG, /*Added for Auto Renewal Flag - Aug22*/
  'I' ACTION_CODE,
  'C'  AS DML_TYPE
  FROM
  (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_HDRS_ALL
 WHERE ERP_ORDER_NUMBER IS NOT NULL
 AND ORDER_ORIGIN IN('CLOUD-CBM')) SXOHA  
  INNER JOIN  
  (SELECT SSO.*,COALESCE(SSO.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT , SSO.SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT) SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW 
  FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO)SSO
  ON SXOHA.HEADER_ID=SSO.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW
LEFT JOIN  
    $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_SOURCES ESOS
    ON  (SXOHA.ORDER_SOURCE_ID=ESOS.SK_ORDER_SOURCE_ID and ESOS.GLOBAL_NAME='CG') 
  /* Added below join to derive SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY */
  LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCAT_SOLD
  ON (SXOHA.SOLD_TO_ORG_ID=NCAT_SOLD.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT )  
  /* Added below join as part of CBM Scope for deriving BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME*/
  LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_TYPES ESOT
  ON ESOT.SK_ORDER_TYPE_ID = SXOHA.ORDER_TYPE_ID
  LEFT JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_CHANNEL NSCT
  ON NSCT.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE=SXOHA.BILLTO_CHANNELID
  AND TRIM(NSCT.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_SOURCE_TYPE)='ERP'
  LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_BILL
  ON (NECALU_BILL.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = SXOHA.INVOICE_TO_ORG_ID)
  LEFT JOIN    $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY  NIC
  ON  NIC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE =SXOHA.CURRENCY_CODE      
  LEFT JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRICE_LIST  NPL  
  ON NPL.SK_PRICE_LIST_ID_INT=SXOHA.PRICE_LIST_ID
  LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE NCPS
  ON NCPS.BK_PARTY_ID_INT=NECALU_BILL.EP_CR_PARTY_ID_INT
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
  ON (NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT=SXOHA.ERP_ORDER_NUMBER)
 /* ADDED AS A PART OF Q4FY19 POST CUT OVER ACQ */
  LEFT JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_OE_ORDER_SOURCES  EL  
  ON COALESCE(EL.ORDER_SOURCE_ID,-999) = COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_SOURCE_ID,-999)
  LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_ACQ_FLOW_CNTRL EL_CNTL
  ON COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_ORIGIN,'UNKNOWN')= COALESCE(EL_CNTL.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,'UNKNOWN')
  AND COALESCE(EL.ORDER_SOURCE_ID,-999)=COALESCE(EL_CNTL.ORDER_SOURCE_ID,-999)
  WHERE 
  ((COALESCE(EL_CNTL.NAME,'UNKNOWN') <> 'Acquisitions')
  OR
  (COALESCE(EL_CNTL.NAME,'UNKNOWN') = 'Acquisitions'
  AND EL_CNTL.ACQ_CNTRL_FLG = 'Y')
  )
